tasks.rationale: The queue has a central expertise-to-evaluation build but no primary-source elicitation method. ACTA directly targets tacit expert cognition through task diagrams, knowledge audits, simulation interviews, and cognitive-demand tables; the broader CTA protocol report supplies proven interview/modeling procedures and forms that can become reproducible benchmark-authoring primitives.
tasks.title: Operationalize cognitive task analysis for expert-to-benchmark transfer
